title: ButterBee - Mob Variants
description: Add-on for CliffTree, populates biomes of the world with diverse new animal variants! Short for "Butterflies and Bees"
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Ntl62SNDSYk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

*Come along with me, and the butterflies and bees...*
# ButterBee

Butterflies and Bees, or **ButterBee**, is an add-on for the world generation mod/datapack **[CliffTree](https://modrinth.com/datapack/clifftree)**, which further expands on the world with the addition biome-based variations for several mobs!

With new variations for cows, pigs, chickens, wolves, and a new frog, the world is sure to feel much more alive and diverse!

See the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/datapack/butterbee/gallery) for each variant and where to find them!

## Important!
If you are using the datapack version, you also need to __**download and enable the [ButterBee resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/butterbee-rp).**__
Starting with 1.0.4, installation of [CliffTree](https://modrinth.com/datapack/clifftree) is optional, but certain variants might not spawn without it.
